descriptions.digital-invest-portfolio: פורטפוליו רב-סקטוריאלי המשתרע על HealthTech, AgroTech, FoodTech, רובוטיקה ובינה מלאכותית. תשתית משותפת וסינרגיות בין-פרויקטליות יוצרות ערך מצטבר ב-20+ מיזמים חדשניים.
descriptions.biomathlife: פלטפורמת רפואה מדויקת עם 200+ שירותי בריאות ב-20 קטגוריות. משלבת ניתוח גנטי, מודלים ביומתמטיים ואבחון בינה מלאכותית למניעת מחלות ואופטימיזציה של אריכות ימים.
descriptions.biomath-core: מערכת הפעלה בריאותית יסודית המאחדת רשומות רפואיות, גנטיקה ואורח חיים לתובנות פעילות. מנוע הנתונים המזין את אקוסיסטם BioMath להחלטות קליניות מדויקות.
descriptions.terraaero: שירותי חקלאות בדרונים ברחבי דרום ארה״ב — ניטור מדויק, אנליטיקת יבולים ואופטימיזציה של משאבים. בניית ייצור דרונים בארה״ב עם מפת דרכים להרחבה ל-23 מדינות.
descriptions.myday: SaaS תכנון יומי מונע בינה מלאכותית הממיר שגרות לדפוסי התנהגות מדידים. מעקב תזונתי מובנה, ניהול אנרגיה וארכיטקטורת מיקרו-יעדים מגובה באנליטיקה.
descriptions.itsgoodtoday: מלווה בריאות הבנוי על פשטות — פעולות יומיות קטנות באוכל, תנועה, מצב רוח ואורח חיים. בלי מורכבות, בלי לחץ. היום טוב. מחר יכול להיות קצת יותר טוב.
descriptions.agron: תשתית לאומית לרובוטיקה אווירית וקרקעית אוטונומית — הכשרה, הסמכה, ניהול צי ותקנים. עמוד השדרה התפעולי של כלכלת הרובוטיקה האמריקאית.
descriptions.luna-balance: פלטפורמת מיינדפולנס המסייעת לנשים להבין את עצמן דרך טכנולוגיית השתיקה ומצב יחסים. קבלה במקום לחץ, תרגום תחושות פנימיות לשפה אנושית.
descriptions.saven: תשתית ביצוע רציף — גישור בין הבנה דיגיטלית למציאות פיזית. מחזור של 5 שלבים (הקשר, פעולה, אימות, בקרה, תמיכה) המבטיח שהחיים נשארים במסלול.
descriptions.baseline: לוגיקה בריאותית מקצועית בפשטות. השקה קלינית בת 4 שלבים — לחיצת יד ביולוגית, קליטת בסיס, סינתזת סמנים, השקה פרוגנוסטית — הממירה רעש קליני לבהירות.
descriptions.table-served: תזונה משפחתית דטרמיניסטית — ארוחות מתוזמנות ממטבחים מוסמכים בארה״ב כל יום ראשון. קופסאות יציבות שבועיות עם מחזור ייצור Friday Lock / Sunday Pulse ומטבחים מקומיים מגוונים.
descriptions.agron-work: פלטפורמת כישרונות המחברת מעסיקים עם מקצוענים מאומתים בדרונים, רובוטיקה, בינה מלאכותית ואוטומציה. גיוס ישיר, הסמכת כישורים ומודיעין כוח אדם לעידן האוטונומיה.
descriptions.mrx-health: סייר תגובות תרופתיות העוקב אחר מרשמים ומנטר השפעות גופניות בזמן אמת. ניתוח ביו-סריקה אינטראקטיבי שומר על בטיחות המטופלים ומזהה אינטראקציות שליליות מוקדם.
descriptions.stresscore: מודיעין מצב פסיכולוגי העוקב אחר מתח, מצב רוח ואנרגיה עם מיקרו-תובנות בינה מלאכותית. מזהה טריגרים, חוזה תקופות אנרגיה נמוכה ומספק התערבויות בזמן לחוסן רגשי.
descriptions.skincore: ניתוח עור מבוסס מצלמה ובינה מלאכותית העוקב אחר מרקם, גוון ושינויי מצב לאורך זמן. משוב ברמת המרכיבים ומעקב מגמות חזותי עוזרים להבין מה באמת עובד לעור שלכם.
descriptions.seniorcore: מערכת תמיכה לקשישים ומטפלים — ניטור דפוסי בריאות, הקפדה על תרופות ורמות פעילות. תובנות בריאותיות בזמן אמת המבטיחות בטיחות, עצמאות ושקט נפשי למשפחה.
descriptions.vitalcore: לוח מחוונים מאוחד של סימנים חיוניים המשלב קצב לב, משתנות קצב לב, שינה, מתח ודפוסי פעילות. מזהה חריגות לפני מצבי חירום ומספק התראות לניהול בריאות פרואקטיבי.
descriptions.bioagecore: ניתוח גיל ביולוגי מונע בינה מלאכותית המשווה גיל כרונולוגי למצב הגוף האמיתי. מעקב אופטימיזציה רציף והתערבויות מותאמות אישית עוזרים למשתמשים לשלוט במסלול ההזדקנות שלהם.

projectCommon.investorDisclaimer: Submitting interest is non-binding and does not create any agreement. All potential participation is discussed individually and offline.
projectCommon.nonMedicalDisclaimer: This is an informational tool for tracking patterns. It is not a medical device and does not diagnose, treat, or prevent any condition or disease. All recommendations are for informational purposes only. Consult qualified healthcare professionals for medical advice.

projectBiomathCore.heroDesc: From sleep to cognition, from movement to mood — BioMath Core brings clarity to your health journey through intelligent real-time insights, 200+ AI-powered services, and a secure personal data vault.
projectBiomathCore.foundationTitle: Core Foundation of the BioMath Ecosystem
projectBiomathCore.foundationDesc: BioMath Core is the central technological foundation upon which all BioMath services are built. Today, the platform powers over 200 specialized AI services across 20 health categories — from Critical Health and Longevity to Mental Wellness and Biohacking. Every BioMath product in our portfolio relies on BioMath Core as its intelligent backbone.
projectBiomathCore.overviewP1: BioMath Core is an intelligent health operating system that unifies medical records, biological data, genetic information, wearable metrics, and lifestyle inputs into a single coherent platform.
projectBiomathCore.overviewP2: Unlike fragmented health apps that track isolated metrics, BioMath Core provides comprehensive analysis across 20 health categories through 200+ specialized AI services — your personal health intelligence layer.
projectBiomathCore.missionSubtitle: Three principles that guide every interaction within the platform
projectBiomathCore.mission1Desc: Convert health signals into meaning, then into gentle supportive guidance. Make complex biology accessible and actionable.
projectBiomathCore.mission2Desc: Build on emotional safety. Users are learning, never failing. Guidance is invitational rather than prescriptive.
projectBiomathCore.mission3Desc: Help users understand how their bodies respond day-to-day. Wellness-first interpretation of patterns, not medical diagnosis.
projectBiomathCore.howSubtitle: Four interconnected stages transform raw health data into daily actionable intelligence
projectBiomathCore.step1Desc: Connect wearables, upload labs, import medical records, add genetic tests. All data flows into the encrypted Model Archive vault.
projectBiomathCore.step2Desc: Server-side engine analyzes data, identifies patterns, correlates metrics across categories, and updates your personal health model continuously.
projectBiomathCore.step3Desc: 200+ specialized AI services examine sleep, nutrition, stress, recovery, cognition, metabolic health and generate personalized insights.
projectBiomathCore.step4Desc: Personalized recommendations through clean dashboards. Visual reports, smart alerts, and context-rich explanations — designed to inform, not alarm.
projectBiomathCore.blackBoxDesc: Your Model Archive — an encrypted vault storing all personal health data with military-grade security. You maintain complete control over data access, sharing, and sovereignty.
projectBiomathCore.categoriesSubtitle: 200+ specialized AI services organized across comprehensive health and wellness domains
projectBiomathCore.visionDesc: BioMath Core aims to become the foundational operating system for personal health — the layer connecting all data sources, generating unified insights, and coordinating wellness across your entire life.
projectBiomathCore.visionDesc2: Over 5-10 years: family health coordination, senior independence through predictive monitoring, smart home integration, automated medication management, and seamless healthcare provider coordination.

projectTerraAero.heroSubtitle: Precision Agriculture and Autonomous Logistics Through Advanced Drone Technology
projectTerraAero.heroDesc: TerraAero develops and operates autonomous drone systems for agricultural monitoring, precision crop management, and intelligent logistics. Combining aerospace engineering with AI-driven analytics and building towards U.S.-based drone manufacturing capabilities.
projectTerraAero.overviewP1: TerraAero combines autonomous aerospace systems with artificial intelligence to deliver scalable solutions for modern agriculture and logistics.
projectTerraAero.overviewP2: Current operations include precision crop spraying, fertilization, field analytics, irrigation monitoring, and logistics delivery across multiple states.
projectTerraAero.mission1Desc: Transform agricultural operations through autonomous drone technology that delivers precision monitoring, resource optimization, and data-driven decision support.
projectTerraAero.mission2Desc: Enable rapid, efficient delivery through autonomous drone systems that reduce transit times, operating costs, and environmental impact.
projectTerraAero.mission3Desc: Develop U.S.-based drone manufacturing infrastructure to reduce supply chain dependencies and optimize aircraft design for specific operational environments.

projectAgron.subtitle: Aerial–Ground Robotics Operations Network
projectAgron.heroDesc: A national-scale infrastructure platform for autonomous aerial and ground robotics — training, certification, operations, and standards across the United States.
projectAgron.positioning1: AGRON is not a robotics startup.
projectAgron.overviewP1: AGRON (Aerial–Ground Robotics Operations Network) is a national-scale infrastructure platform designed to support the training, certification, coordination, and real-world operation of autonomous aerial and ground robotic systems across the United States.
projectAgron.overviewP2: AGRON is not a hardware manufacturer and does not produce drones or robots. Its role is to act as the operational, educational, and regulatory interface between autonomous technologies, human operators, enterprises, and government institutions.
projectAgron.coreMissionDesc: To build a trusted national system that enables safe, scalable, and standardized deployment of autonomous aerial and ground robotic systems for commercial, governmental, and defense applications.

projectMyDay.heroDesc: MyDay transforms daily planning through AI-driven insights, habit tracking, and behavioral optimization. From structured routines to nutrition logging - making better daily decisions simple, measurable, and consistently improving.
projectMyDay.overviewP1: MyDay is an AI-powered daily planning and habit optimization platform designed to help individuals structure their day, track routines, nutrition, and behaviors, and turn everyday data into actionable insights.
projectMyDay.overviewP2: Unlike generic productivity apps or simple habit trackers, MyDay integrates structured planning, behavioral tracking, and AI-driven feedback into a single, cohesive workflow.

projectTableServed.heroDesc: Deterministic family nutrition. Scheduled meals prepared in certified US hubs, delivered every Sunday to reclaim your week. Simple. Structural.
projectTableServed.whatIsDesc: TableServed isn't a delivery app — it's a weekly stability protocol. We've replaced daily chaos with a reliable, predictable rhythm.
projectTableServed.protocolSubtitle: Four deterministic steps. No guesswork, no last-minute decisions.

projectSkinCore.heroSubtitle: ניתוח עור AI מתמונות עם מעקב מגמות
projectSkinCore.overviewDesc: Skin uses camera-based AI analysis to recognize skin patterns and track visual trends over time. The platform provides recommendations with ingredient-level feedback, helping users understand what works for their skin through daily and weekly tracking without medical positioning.
projectSkinCore.feature1Desc: Camera-based pattern recognition for skin texture, tone, and condition tracking (non-medical).
projectSkinCore.feature2Desc: Monitor skin changes over days and weeks with clear before/after comparisons.
projectSkinCore.feature3Desc: Understand which ingredients work for your skin based on tracking and patterns.
projectSkinCore.feature4Desc: AI identifies correlations between products, routines, and skin condition changes.
projectSkinCore.legalText: Skin is an informational tool for tracking skin appearance patterns. It is not a medical device and does not diagnose, treat, or prevent any skin condition or disease. All recommendations are for informational purposes only. Consult qualified healthcare professionals for medical advice.

projectStressCore.heroSubtitle: אינטליגנציה של מצב פסיכולוגי: לחץ, מצב רוח, אנרגיה
projectStressCore.overviewP1: Stress (Mind) is a lightweight application focusing on psychological state management. In today's fast-paced world, there is a strong market demand for tools that help people understand and stabilize their mental and emotional state. This platform addresses that need with simplicity and precision.
projectStressCore.overviewP2: The platform tracks three core elements: stress levels, mood patterns, and energy fluctuations throughout the day. It provides short AI-generated tips and micro-insights that help users become more aware of their psychological patterns and make small adjustments that have meaningful impact.
projectStressCore.elem1Desc: Simple, intuitive tracking of stress levels throughout the day. Quick check-ins that take seconds. Pattern recognition showing when and why stress peaks occur.
projectStressCore.elem2Desc: Capture emotional state with minimal effort. Track mood shifts over time. Identify triggers and patterns that affect emotional well-being.
projectStressCore.elem3Desc: Monitor energy fluctuations through the day. Understand when you're at your best and when you need rest. Optimize scheduling around natural energy patterns.
projectStressCore.elem4Desc: Ultra-short, actionable tips generated by AI based on your patterns. No long articles or overwhelming advice. Just simple suggestions you can implement immediately.
projectStressCore.elem5Desc: Identify recurring patterns in stress, mood, and energy. Understand how different activities, people, and situations affect your psychological state.
projectStressCore.elem6Desc: Build awareness of your current state throughout the day. Catch stress escalation early. Recognize when you need a break before burnout occurs.
projectStressCore.triadIntro: Stress is built around three interconnected dimensions of psychological state:
projectStressCore.triadStressDesc: Stress is not always negative, but chronic or excessive stress damages health and performance. Stress module helps users track their stress load, identify sources, and recognize when they're approaching overload. Quick check-ins throughout the day create awareness without adding burden.
projectStressCore.triadMoodDesc: Mood affects decision-making, relationships, creativity, and overall quality of life. By tracking mood patterns, users gain insight into what lifts or lowers their emotional state. This awareness enables proactive choices that support emotional stability.
projectStressCore.triadEnergyDesc: Energy levels fluctuate naturally throughout the day, but chronic low energy signals deeper issues. Understanding your energy patterns helps you schedule important tasks during peak periods and protect recovery time when energy is low.
projectStressCore.guide1Desc: Guidance is delivered in ultra-short messages. No paragraphs, no lectures. Just simple suggestions like "Take a 5-minute walk now" or "Schedule a break in the next hour." Users appreciate brevity when they're stressed or busy.
projectStressCore.guide2Desc: The AI learns from your historical data. It recognizes what works for you and what doesn't. Recommendations become more personalized over time, increasing their relevance and impact.
projectStressCore.guide3Desc: Timing matters. Suggestions are delivered when they're most useful: when stress is rising, when mood is dropping, or when energy is depleting. Proactive guidance prevents issues before they escalate.
projectStressCore.use1Desc: Quick, 10-second check-ins at key moments: morning, midday, evening. Build awareness without disrupting workflow. Track how your state evolves as the day progresses.
projectStressCore.use2Desc: When stress and energy data show overload, the system suggests slowing down or redistributing tasks. This helps prevent burnout and maintains sustainable performance over weeks and months.
projectStressCore.use3Desc: Many people operate on autopilot, unaware of their psychological state until it's too late. StressCore builds moment-to-moment awareness, enabling users to make adjustments before small issues become big problems.
projectStressCore.ecosystemIntro: Stress integrates with other components of the BioMath health intelligence platform:
projectStressCore.ecoSleepDesc: Stress and mood during the day directly affect sleep quality at night. Understanding this connection helps users improve both.
projectStressCore.ecoMoveDesc: Physical activity can reduce stress and improve mood. Stress and Move work together to identify activity patterns that support mental well-being.
projectStressCore.ecoVitalDesc: Chronic stress shows up in vital signs like heart rate variability and resting heart rate. Vital uses Stress data to provide early warnings about stress overload.
projectStressCore.ecoCoreDesc: Advanced analysis of psychological patterns and their impact on overall health metrics and risk factors.
projectStressCore.ecoLifeDesc: Aggregates stress, mood, and energy data with other health streams to provide a complete picture of daily well-being.
projectStressCore.marketDesc: There is currently a very strong psychological demand in the market for tools that help people understand and stabilize their mental and emotional state. Work pressure, social complexity, and information overload create constant stress. People want simple, accessible tools that provide clarity and guidance without adding to their cognitive load. StressCore addresses this need with a design philosophy of simplicity, approachability, and actionable insight.
projectStressCore.legalText: Stress (Mind) is an informational tool and is not a mental health treatment or diagnostic system. It does not replace therapy, counseling, or medical intervention for mental health conditions. Users experiencing severe stress, anxiety, depression, or other mental health issues should consult qualified healthcare professionals. All decisions regarding mental and emotional health remain the responsibility of the user.

projectVitalCore.overviewP1: Vital is an early warning system built around vital signs and key health patterns. It analyzes heart rate, heart rate variability (HRV), sleep quality, stress levels, and activity data to detect when "something is off." By combining multiple inputs, it identifies subtle changes that indicate the body is under pressure.
projectVitalCore.overviewP2: The platform serves as an early signal engine, showing when the body is approaching overload before serious problems develop. It helps users take preventive action: rest more, reduce stress, adjust activity, or consult healthcare professionals if needed. Vital keeps people engaged because it provides value by warning them early.
projectVitalCore.src1Desc: Continuous heart rate monitoring throughout the day and night. Resting heart rate trends, exercise response, recovery patterns. Elevated resting HR can signal stress, illness, or overtraining.
projectVitalCore.src2Desc: HRV measures the variation in time between heartbeats. Higher HRV typically indicates better recovery and resilience. Declining HRV can signal stress, fatigue, or illness before symptoms appear.
projectVitalCore.src3Desc: Sleep data from Sleep module: duration, stages, interruptions, consistency. Poor sleep affects all other health metrics and increases risk of illness and burnout.
projectVitalCore.src4Desc: Stress data from Stress/Mind module. Chronic stress shows up in vital signs and contributes to cardiovascular risk, immune suppression, and mental health issues.
projectVitalCore.src5Desc: Movement and exercise data from Move. Sudden decreases in activity can indicate fatigue or illness. Overtraining shows up as elevated resting HR and reduced HRV.
projectVitalCore.src6Desc: Vital doesn't just track individual metrics. It looks for patterns across all data sources. Combinations of changes are more meaningful than single indicators.
projectVitalCore.signalTitle: Signal Detection: When Something Is Off
projectVitalCore.signalIntro: Vital continuously analyzes your health data streams, looking for patterns that indicate the body is under pressure. These signals often appear before you feel sick or exhausted:
projectVitalCore.sig1Desc: Deviation from your personal baselines. A sudden increase in resting heart rate, a drop in HRV, or deteriorating sleep quality all signal that something has changed. Vital tracks these shifts and alerts you when they cross thresholds.
projectVitalCore.sig2Desc: Stress, poor sleep, and high activity can accumulate over days or weeks. Each day might seem manageable, but the cumulative load can push the body toward breakdown. Vital tracks this accumulation and warns when you're approaching unsustainable levels.
projectVitalCore.sig3Desc: When activity and stress are high but recovery (sleep, low heart rate, high HRV) is insufficient, the body cannot repair itself. Vital identifies these recovery gaps and recommends adjustments before exhaustion or illness occur.
projectVitalCore.sig4Desc: A single metric out of range might not be concerning, but multiple metrics shifting together indicate a real issue. Vital's strength is combining inputs to generate more accurate and actionable alerts.
projectVitalCore.alert1Desc: Vital alerts are designed to be early and gentle. They're not medical alarms or panic-inducing notifications. Instead, they're friendly reminders that your body is showing signs of stress and might need attention.
projectVitalCore.alert2Desc: Alerts come with suggestions: "Consider getting extra sleep tonight," "Reduce intense exercise for a few days," "Check stress levels and take breaks." These recommendations are practical and immediately implementable.
projectVitalCore.alert3Desc: Users can view their vital signs over time: heart rate trends, HRV changes, sleep quality patterns. Visual feedback helps them understand what's improving, what's declining, and why.
projectVitalCore.alert4Desc: Vital keeps users engaged because it provides real, tangible value. When the system warns them of approaching illness or burnout, and they take action and avoid the issue, they trust the platform more. This trust drives long-term engagement and usage.
projectVitalCore.ecosystemTitle: How VitalCore Ties Into the Portfolio
projectVitalCore.ecosystemIntro: Vital is the "sentry" for the BioMath ecosystem. It sits at the center of the platform, monitoring all incoming health data streams and watching for early warning signs:
projectVitalCore.ecoSleepDesc: Provides sleep quality data that feeds into Vital's recovery assessment and early warning algorithms.
projectVitalCore.ecoStressDesc: Supplies stress and mood data that helps Vital understand psychological load and its impact on physical health.
projectVitalCore.ecoMoveDesc: Contributes activity and movement data to assess whether the user is balancing exertion with recovery.
projectVitalCore.ecoCoreDesc: Provides advanced computational analysis and risk modeling based on the vital signs and patterns detected by Vital.
projectVitalCore.ecoLifeDesc: Aggregates all health streams, with Vital serving as the central early warning layer that protects users from overload and guides them toward sustainable health practices.
projectVitalCore.use1Desc: Avoid overtraining by monitoring recovery through HRV and resting heart rate. Adjust training intensity based on Vital's early warnings.
projectVitalCore.use2Desc: Track the physiological impact of work stress. Receive early warnings when stress is affecting cardiovascular health and recovery capacity.
projectVitalCore.use3Desc: Monitor overall health trends and catch potential issues early. Use Vital as a continuous health check that guides lifestyle decisions.
projectVitalCore.legalText: Vital is an informational tool and early warning system. It is not a medical device and does not diagnose, treat, or prevent any medical condition. Alerts and insights are based on pattern recognition and should not replace professional medical evaluation. Users experiencing concerning symptoms or health changes should consult qualified healthcare professionals. All decisions regarding health and medical care remain the responsibility of the user and their healthcare providers.

projectBioAgeCore.heroSubtitle: ניתוח AI של גיל ביולוגי ומעקב אופטימיזציה
projectBioAgeCore.overviewP1: BioAge provides biological age estimation based on real-life signals including sleep, recovery, stress, and activity patterns. Biological age serves as a high-level indicator of system health, reflecting how well your body is functioning relative to your chronological age.
projectBioAgeCore.overviewP2: The platform tracks trajectory and dynamics to show whether biological age is improving or worsening over time, providing clear explanations about influencing factors without medical claims.
projectBioAgeCore.func1Desc: AI-powered analysis estimates your biological age based on comprehensive health signals and lifestyle patterns.
projectBioAgeCore.func2Desc: Monitor whether your biological age is improving or worsening over time with clear trend visualization.
projectBioAgeCore.func3Desc: Understand which lifestyle factors have the strongest impact on your biological age indicators.

projectFamilyCore.overviewP2: From tracking children's health patterns to managing vaccination schedules and nutrition planning, Family helps parents stay organized and informed without feeling overwhelmed by medical terminology or complex systems.

projectFamilyCore.func2Desc: Track sleep patterns and receive age-appropriate recommendations for healthy sleep routines.
projectFamilyCore.func3Desc: Informational vaccination tracking with reminders for upcoming appointments (non-medical guidance).
projectFamilyCore.func4Desc: Age-appropriate nutrition guidance and meal planning ideas tailored to family preferences and needs.
projectFamilyCore.func5Desc: Track developmental milestones and physical growth with age-appropriate benchmarks (informational only).
projectFamilyCore.func6Desc: Record illnesses, injuries, and health events for easy reference during medical appointments.
projectFamilyCore.step1Desc: Create profiles for each child with age, basic health information, and any special considerations or preferences.
projectFamilyCore.step2Desc: Set up daily health routines including sleep schedules, meal times, medication reminders, and activity goals.
projectFamilyCore.step3Desc: Receive timely notifications for important health tasks, appointments, and routine care activities.
projectFamilyCore.step4Desc: Monitor health patterns over time with simple visualizations that highlight improvements or areas needing attention.
projectFamilyCore.benefit1: All family health information in one easy-to-access location
projectFamilyCore.benefit2: Clear reminders for appointments, medications, and routine care
projectFamilyCore.benefit3: Age-appropriate guidance without overwhelming medical complexity
projectFamilyCore.benefit4: Historical health records ready for pediatrician visits
projectFamilyCore.benefit5: Nutrition and sleep recommendations based on current research
projectFamilyCore.benefit6: Peace of mind knowing important health tasks won't be forgotten
projectFamilyCore.ecosystemDesc: Family extends the BioMath ecosystem to family health management, applying proven health intelligence principles to the unique needs of parents and children.
projectFamilyCore.designPracticalDesc: While other modules target individual optimization, Family prioritizes practical organization and peace of mind for busy parents.
projectFamilyCore.designAgeDesc: Recommendations are tailored to each child's developmental stage and family circumstances.
projectFamilyCore.designSimpleDesc: Designed for quick check-ins during busy daily routines rather than deep analysis.
projectFamilyCore.designInfoDesc: Focuses on making health information accessible and actionable for non-medical users.
projectFamilyCore.ideal1Desc: Parents juggling work and family who need efficient health management without complexity.
projectFamilyCore.ideal2Desc: New parents who want guidance and organization as they navigate childhood health milestones.
projectFamilyCore.ideal3Desc: Families with multiple children needing to track different ages, schedules, and health needs.
projectFamilyCore.ideal4Desc: Families prioritizing preventive health and wanting to establish good habits early in childhood.
projectFamilyCore.legalText: Family is an informational and organizational tool designed to help parents manage family health routines. It is not a medical device and does not diagnose, treat, or prevent any medical condition. The information and guidance provided are for educational purposes only. All medical decisions regarding children's health should be made in consultation with qualified pediatric healthcare professionals. Family does not replace professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.

adamas.heroSubtitle: אוסף מגוון של פרויקטים המקיף את תעשיית היהלומים, רובוטיקה, מסחר אלקטרוני, נכסים דיגיטליים וטכנולוגיה וטרינרית.

disclaimer.title: הודעה חשובה:
disclaimer.text: חלק זה מיועד למידע בלבד. פרויקטי Adamas Materials מוצגים בנפרד ואינם מהווים הצעה ציבורית.

adamasMaterials.title: Adamas Materials
adamasMaterials.description: ספק B2B/B2G אמריקאי של יהלומים טכניים וחומרים מתקדמים עבור מעבדות מחקר, מו"פ תאגידי, מגזרים ממשלתיים וביטחוניים.
adamasMaterials.longDescription:
Adamas Materials היא חברת B2B/B2G אמריקאית המתמחה באספקת יהלומים טכניים וחומרים מתקדמים למעבדות מחקר, חטיבות מו"פ תאגידיות ומבני ממשל וביטחון.

תיק המוצרים מקיף ארבעה כיוונים אסטרטגיים: חומרי קוונטום וחישה, חומרי ניהול תרמי, כלי עבודה ורכיבי שחיקה, וחומרים ומינרלים תומכים עם מפרטים טכניים מלאים.

ממוצבת כספק תעשייתי ומדעי — לא צרכני ולא תכשיטים — Adamas Materials פועלת על מודל RFQ ללא תמחור ציבורי, עם מיקוד חוזי ומחקרי קפדני.

originDiamond.title: Origin Diamond
originDiamond.description: שירות יהלומי מעבדה מותאם אישית בו הלקוח יוצר את האבן שלו — בוחר פרמטרים, משלב מסר נסתר ומקבל יהלום מאושר ייחודי הקשור לסיפור שלו.
originDiamond.longDescription:
Origin Diamond הוא שירות ואפליקציה בהם הלקוח לא קונה יהלום מוגמר — אלא יוצר אותו. הפלטפורמה מנחה כל אדם דרך בחירת פרמטרים, השתתפות בתהליך הגידול, מעקב אחר אבני דרך וקבלת אבן מאושרת עם מסר אישי נסתר הניתן לקריאה רק דרך עדשה ייחודית.

מסע הלקוח משתרע על שבעה שלבים: שאלון ערכים, בחירת פרמטרי אבן, שכבת מסר, אישור בלתי הפיך, ציר זמן גידול, עיצוב תכשיט מונחה וערכת חשיפה — אבן, עדשה ותעודת לידה.

יהלום שעזרת ליצור. מסר שרק אתה יכול לקרוא. סיפור שנשאר.

agronNet.title: AGRON-NET
agronNet.description: תשתית לאומית לרובוטיקה אווירית וקרקעית אוטונומית — הכשרה, הסמכה, ניהול ציים ותקנים. עמוד השדרה התפעולי של כלכלת הרובוטיקה האמריקאית.
agronNet.longDescription:
AGRON היא פלטפורמת תשתית לאומית לתמיכה בהכשרה, הסמכה, תיאום והפעלה בפועל של מערכות רובוטיות אוטונומיות אוויריות וקרקעיות ברחבי ארה"ב.

AGRON אינה מייצרת רחפנים או רובוטים. תפקידה הוא ממשק תפעולי, חינוכי ורגולטורי בין טכנולוגיות אוטונומיות, מפעילים וארגונים.

תחומים: רובוטיקה אווירית, קרקעית ומשימות משולבות אוויר-קרקע.

agronWork.title: AGRON-Work
agronWork.description: פלטפורמת כישרונות המחברת מעסיקים עם מקצוענים מאומתים ברחפנים, רובוטיקה, AI ואוטומציה. גיוס ישיר, הסמכת מיומנויות ומודיעין כוח אדם.
agronWork.longDescription: AGRON-Work היא פלטפורמת גיוס מתמחה לתעשיית הרובוטיקה האוטונומית. מחברת מעסיקים עם מקצוענים מאומתים — מטייסי רחפנים ועד מהנדסי רובוטיקה ומומחי AI.
